articles.title: 'ANTM' judge slams 'incredibly rude' Jay Manuel for speaking out against Tyra Banks - Entertainment Weekly
articles.description: 'ANTM' judge Kelly Cutrone has spoken out against Jay Manuel for criticizing Tyra Banks on the new 'America's Next Top Model' docuseries, and alleged that Manuel was 'incredibly rude' to her on set.
articles.content: Former America's Next Top Model judge and Bravo reality star Kelly Cutrone has hit back at creative director Jay Manuel after the latter spoke out against Tyra Banks in the new Netflix docuseries Rea… [+6538 chars]
